hypothesis: Concrete eBPF Bytecode Modification:** Implement state snapshots by pre-allocating a `BPF_MAP_TYPE_PERCPU_ARRAY`. Modify the sorting bytecode to replace scalar element swaps with unrolled block moves. Inject a sequence of 8 consecutive `BPF_LDX_MEM(BPF_DW, ...)` (load double word) followed by 8 `BPF_STX_MEM(BPF_DW, ...)` instructions. This explicitly forces the eBPF JIT compiler to emit sequential `mov` instructions that perfectly align with a 64-byte cache line boundary.
